project_type: Next.js 16 App Router site with Tailwind CSS v4
build_system: pnpm (package.json scripts: dev, build, start, lint). next.config.mjs has ignoreBuildErrors: true and images.unoptimized: true
test_framework: No test framework found - no test files exist
build_command: Cannot run - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network blocks pnpm install
test_command: Cannot run - no tests and no node_modules
verification_instructions: Verify via TypeScript AST correctness - check imports resolve to existing files, ensure no syntax errors. Run `npx tsc --noEmit` if node_modules become available.
setup_instructions: pnpm install (blocked by network). All code changes are source-only.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no npm/pnpm install, no external fetches. node_modules does NOT exist. Verification limited to file content correctness and cross-file import consistency. Cannot run next build or next dev.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md. Project uses 'use client' directive on interactive pages. Tailwind v4 with @theme inline block in globals.css. Fonts loaded via next/font/google in layout.tsx with CSS variables.
key_patterns: 1) Fonts: loaded in layout.tsx as next/font/google, exposed as --font-xxx CSS variables, consumed in @theme inline block. 2) Colors: defined as CSS custom properties in :root, mapped to Tailwind via @theme inline. 3) Components: 'use client' pages import components from components/. 4) Data: fetchSaviours() from lib/storage.ts talks to Google Sheets. 5) Animations: motion-reveal, motion-stagger, motion-cta CSS classes with useScrollAnimation hook. 6) Weather: Open-Meteo API fetched in hero-section.tsx. 7) Modals: FormModal + CertificateModal rendered in page.tsx, triggered by state. 8) Nav: fixed top, navy bg, links from lib/navigation.ts
directory_structure: app/ - pages (layout.tsx, page.tsx, founders-message/page.tsx, saviours/page.tsx). components/ - UI components + components/ui/ (shadcn primitives). lib/ - brand, storage, saviours, navigation, utils. hooks/ - use-scroll-animation, use-mobile, use-toast. public/ - images (akshay-blend.png, akshay-blend-transparent.png, akshay-signature.png, hero-bowl-sketch.png, bird-icon.png, etc.)
